_comment: Single source of truth for portfolio projects. To swap a project in/out, edit this file only — no HTML changes. Set "visible": false to hide without deleting. Set "featured": true to sort it to the front. Order within the same featured/visible group follows array order. Tag colors: blue | purple | green (defaults to neutral).

projects.title: E-Commerce Conversational Chatbot
projects.description: Retrieval-augmented chatbot for e-commerce — natural-language product discovery, order queries, and personalized recommendations.

projects.title: Product Recommendation Engine
projects.description: Hybrid recommendation system delivering personalised product suggestions to lift user engagement and conversion.

projects.title: AI Avatar Chatbot — LMS
projects.description: AI avatar tutor embedded in a learning platform — interactive, context-aware tutoring and course navigation for students.

projects.title: LLM Document Processing
projects.description: Enterprise RAG pipeline for intelligent document retrieval — turning large document stores into instant, grounded answers.

projects.title: AI Agent Virtual Assistant
projects.description: Autonomous agent for multi-step task execution, tool use, and intelligent decision-making across business workflows.

projects.title: Customer Sentiment Analysis
projects.description: NLP sentiment pipeline classifying customer feedback in the betting industry to surface actionable insights and improve retention.
